# Nuvisco — Digital Craft Studio

> Nuvisco is a digital craft studio building visually unreal websites, immersive 3D experiences, and SEO-driven growth for ambitious brands. Founded in 2026 by Jacob Williams, Josh Geo, and Isabelle Viles. Based in Cambridge & Cambridgeshire, UK.

## Core Pages

- Homepage: https://nuvisco.com/
- Services: https://nuvisco.com/services.html
- About: https://nuvisco.com/about.html
- Contact: https://nuvisco.com/contact.html
- Privacy Policy: https://nuvisco.com/privacy-policy.html
- Terms & Conditions: https://nuvisco.com/terms-and-conditions.html
- Accessibility Statement: https://nuvisco.com/accessibility-statement.html

## Services

Nuvisco provides four core services:

### 1. Immersive Web Design
- Bespoke layouts and typography
- Fluid scroll-triggered animations
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Conversion-optimised user flows
- Every build is one-of-one, designed from a blank canvas

### 2. 3D & WebGL Development
- Interactive 3D product showcases
- Scroll-driven 3D storytelling
- Custom shader effects and particles
- WebGL performance optimisation
- Built on Three.js and GSAP

### 3. SEO Engineering
- Technical SEO audits and implementation
- Core Web Vitals optimisation
- Structured data and schema markup
- AI search optimisation (llms.txt)
- Clean semantics for search engine visibility

### 4. Brand & Art Direction
- Brand identity and visual systems
- Art direction and mood boards
- Motion language and design tokens
- Style guides and brand documentation

## Pricing

- **Website Project**: £1,000 — complete custom-built website including design, development, SEO setup, and launch. Payment is 50% upfront to begin the project, with the remaining 50% due upon completion and before launch.
- **Maintenance Plan**: £200 every 4 weeks — ongoing updates, security patches, performance monitoring, and priority support

## About

Nuvisco is a collective of designers, engineers, and motion artists who treat every pixel like it matters. The studio was founded in 2026 by:

- **Jacob Williams** — Co-Founder, Design & Art Direction
- **Josh Geo** — Co-Founder, 3D & WebGL Development
- **Isabelle Viles** — Co-Founder, SEO & Engineering

### What Makes Nuvisco Different
- No templates — every build is one-of-one
- 3D is native, not bolted on
- Core Web Vitals in the green, sub-second loads
- Structured data, clean semantics, and technical SEO depth
- Every pixel, type, rhythm, and easing is treated like an instrument

- Availability:

  - Weekends: 09:00-21:00 GMT
- Response time: Within one business day

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How much does a website cost?
A complete website project costs £1,000. Payment is 50% upfront to begin the project, with the remaining 50% due upon completion and before launch. An optional maintenance plan is available for £200 every 4 weeks.

### How long does it take to build a website?
For small to medium-sized businesses, Nuvisco websites are typically completed within around 2 weeks, depending on requirements and feedback speed.

### Do I need a new website or a redesign?
Nuvisco focuses on creating custom websites from the ground up. This allows greater control over design, performance, functionality, and user experience.

### Will my new website get me more customers?
A website cannot guarantee customers, but a professionally designed website with strong messaging, trust signals, clear calls-to-action, and good user experience can help businesses generate more enquiries.

### What makes a website convert visitors into customers?
High-converting websites typically include: clear messaging, strong calls-to-action, mobile optimisation, fast loading speeds, trust signals such as reviews and testimonials, and simple navigation.

### Will my website rank on Google?
No company can guarantee Google rankings. However, Nuvisco builds websites with SEO best practices, strong structure, performance optimisation, and content organisation to improve search engine visibility.

### What platforms do you build websites with?
Nuvisco creates custom websites from scratch, providing full control over design and functionality.

### Do you build websites for small businesses?
Yes. Nuvisco specialises in helping small and local businesses create a more professional online presence.

### Can you redesign my website while keeping my branding?
Yes. Existing branding elements such as logos, colours, fonts, images, and business identity can be incorporated into a new website.

### Do I need a website if I already get customers from referrals?
A website can help businesses establish credibility, attract new customers, and make it easier to scale beyond referrals.

### Why isn't my current website generating leads?
Common issues include: weak calls-to-action, poor mobile experience, slow performance, lack of trust signals, poor messaging, and weak SEO foundations.

### Do you create websites for every industry?
Nuvisco works with many industries, particularly local service businesses. Each project is assessed individually.

### Can you improve my website's mobile experience?
Yes. Mobile optimisation is a core part of Nuvisco's website development process.

### How do I know if my website is outdated?
A website may need updating if: it looks outdated compared with competitors, it is difficult to navigate, it does not work well on mobile, it does not generate enquiries, or it lacks modern design standards.

### What makes a website look trustworthy?
Trustworthy websites usually have: professional design, clear information, consistent branding, reviews and testimonials, easy navigation, fast performance, and strong user experience.

## Ideal Clients

Nuvisco specialises in creating websites for:
- Local service businesses
- Tradespeople
- Automotive businesses
- Detailing companies
- Professional services
- Hospitality businesses
- Beauty and lifestyle brands
- Small businesses looking to improve their online presence

## Website Design Process

1. Business and website analysis
2. Custom homepage concept and design direction
3. Website development
4. Mobile optimisation and performance improvements
5. SEO and AI search optimisation setup
6. Launch and optional ongoing maintenance

## Technical Details

- Built with vanilla JavaScript, Three.js, GSAP, and AOS
- Custom cursor with magnetic hover effects
- 3D particle fields and interactive WebGL scenes
- Responsive design with mobile-first approach
- SEO-optimised with structured data (JSON-LD)
- WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliant
- Keyboard-navigable with skip-to-content links
- Focus-visible indicators for keyboard users
- Screen reader friendly with ARIA labels and roles
- Reduced motion support via prefers-reduced-motion
